title: narcissus tazetta var. etruscus
intro: Narcissus tazetta var. etruscus, also known as the mini jonquil, is a naturalized species of flowering bulbous perennial plant, belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta var. etruscus include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
